name: myco
description: Myco: agent-first cognitive substrate. 20 manifest-driven verbs (germinate / hunger / eat / sense / forage / excrete / intake / assimilate / digest / sporulate / traverse / propagate / immune / senesce / fruit / molt / winnow / ramify / graft / brief) over a self-validating markdown+YAML filesystem. 46 lint dimensions across 7 subsystems enforce contract invariants mechanically. Schema v2 canon, MCP capabilities (tools, resources, prompts, sampling), stdio + streamable-http + OAuth 2.1 transports. Adds a myco-substrate skill that onboards the agent when the user's workspace contains `_canon.yaml` or the user mentions Myco-flavoured operations.
